calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Beldon Yee, #2647.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Well Fargo Bank, a national association.
Leo Holloway, Records Keeper for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Peter W. Budlong.
Default was entered against defendant on August 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 23, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, a national association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Peter W. Budlong Cortez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,978.79.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,013.11.
Attorney Fees - $2,239.15.
Late Fees - $39.00.
Costs - $532.28, for a total judgment in the amount of $39,802.33.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
